Event: Magic Well - November 2024

Sage Bot Item Code: A19


Other locations the gear can be found
Adventurer Challenge
Magic Well Junk Chest
Bird Scarf Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while

Magic Storm
A magical storm erupts for the duration of 8 sec. Every 1 sec, it casts decay on a random enemy's armor. When the enemy's armor is decayed, that enemy takes 200000 pure damage and has their magic armor reduced by 25% for 4 sec. Also, that enemy takes 300000 magic damage over 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
